steps.title: Identify the key evidence about her authority
steps.content: The passage provides one decisive clue: Merneith “was in charge of the country's treasury and other central offices.” This fact directly reveals her governmental responsibilities.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the answer
steps.content:
The evidence shows she controlled the treasury and central offices—major governmental functions—which directly demonstrates she held an important governmental role.

That is exactly the needed conclusion. The other three choices either contradict the passage (B incorrectly places her after the First Dynasty when she was the wife of a First Dynasty pharaoh) or are completely unsupported by the text (C and D claim travel and creation of writing systems that never appear in the passage).

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
